heading: Down payment loan program
label: 1935 Down payment loan program
notes: Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: Notwithstanding any other section of this subchapter, the Secretary shall establish, within the farm ownership loan program established under this subchapter, a program under which loans shall be made under this section to eligible farmers or ranchers for down payments on farm ownership loans.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 2 Administration
children.text: The Secretary shall be the primary coordinator of credit supervision for the down payment loan program established under this section, in consultation with the commercial or cooperative lender and, if applicable, the contracting credit counseling service selected under .section 2006b(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the purchase price of the farm or ranch to be acquired;

children.label: B
children.text: the appraised value of the farm or ranch to be acquired; or

children.label: A
children.text: the difference obtained by subtracting 4 percent from the interest rate for farm ownership loans under this subchapter; or

children.label: B
children.text: 1.5 percent.

children.heading: Duration
children.label: 3 Duration
children.text: Each loan under this section shall be made for a period of 20 years or less, at the option of the borrower.

children.heading: Repayment
children.label: 4 Repayment
children.text: Each borrower of a loan under this section shall repay the loan to the Secretary in equal annual installments.

children.label: A
children.text: be secured by the farm or ranch;

children.label: B
children.text: be junior only to such interests in the farm or ranch as may be conveyed at the time of acquisition to the person (including a lender) from whom the borrower obtained a loan used to acquire the farm or ranch; and

children.label: C
children.text: require the borrower to obtain the permission of the Secretary before the borrower may grant an additional security interest in the farm or ranch.

children.heading: Borrowers required to make minimum down payment
children.label: 1 Borrowers required to make minimum down payment
children.text: The Secretary shall not make a loan under this section to any borrower with respect to a farm or ranch if the contribution of the borrower to the down payment on the farm or ranch will be less than 5 percent of the purchase price of the farm or ranch.

children.label: A
children.text: The financing is to be amortized over a period of less than 30 years.

children.label: B
children.text: A balloon payment will be due on the financing during the 20-year period beginning on the date the loan is to be made by the Secretary.
facilitate the transfer of farms and ranches from retiring farmers and ranchers to persons eligible for insured loans under this subchapter;

children.label: A
children.text: potentially eligible farmers or ranchers;

children.label: B
children.text: retiring farmers and ranchers; and

children.label: C
children.text: applicants for farm ownership loans under this subchapter;
encourage retiring farmers and ranchers to assist in the sale of their farms and ranches to eligible farmers or ranchers by providing seller financing;

children.label: A
children.text: beginning farmers or ranchers;

children.label: B
children.text: socially disadvantaged farmers or ranchers, as defined in ; orsection 2003(e) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: veteran farmers or ranchers, as defined in ; and; andsection 2279(a) of this title1So in original.1

establish annual performance goals to promote the use of the down payment loan program and other joint financing arrangements as the preferred choice for direct real estate loans made by any lender to an eligible farmer or rancher.

children.heading: Definition of eligible farmer or rancher
children.label: e Definition of eligible farmer or rancher

children.text: a qualified beginning farmer or rancher;
a socially disadvantaged farmer or rancher, as defined in ; andsection 2003(e) of this title
a veteran farmer or rancher, as defined in .section 2279(a) of this title
